# Anime Architecture Archive

> Structured analysis of fictional anime universes focused on power systems, causality, factions, and formal constraints.

Primary index: https://animearchive.app/
Sitemap: https://animearchive.app/sitemap.xml

## URL patterns
- Universe analyses: https://animearchive.app/universe/{slug}
- Archive homepage: https://animearchive.app/

## Data model notes
- Each universe page is a dual-voice analysis (LORE + SYS)
- Content includes characters, power systems, factions, rules, and ranking structures
- Universe routes are stable and slug-based for long-term referencing

## Attribution
This is a fan-made analytical archive. Original characters and source IP belong to their respective creators and studios.
